ddls:
CREATE TABLE "orders" (
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each order */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product ordered */,
  "quantity_ordered" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product ordered */,
  "price_each" REAL /* Price of the product per unit */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date and time when the order was placed */,
  "purchase_address" TEXT /* Address where the order was shipped */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who placed the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Current status of the order (e.g., pending, shipped, delivered, canceled) */,
  "total_amount" REAL /* Total amount of the order (quantity * price_each) */,
  "payment_method" TEXT /* Method of payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal) */,
  "shipping_method" TEXT /* Method of shipping (e.g., standard, express) */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected date of delivery */,
  "actual_delivery_date" TEXT /* Actual date of delivery */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Any additional notes or comments */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_orders_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "products" (
  "product_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each product */,
  "product_name" TEXT /* Name of the product */,
  "stock_quantity" INTEGER /* Number of items available in stock */,
  "category" TEXT /* Category of the product (e.g., Electronics, Home Appliances) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the product */,
  "cost_price" REAL /* Cost price of the product */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Stock level at which a reorder is triggered */,
  "lead_time" INTEGER /* Lead time for restocking (in days) */,
  "rating" REAL /* Average customer rating for the product */,
  "description" TEXT /* Detailed description of the product */,
  "image_url" TEXT /* URL to the product image */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was added */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the product was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_products_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sales" (
  "sale_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each sale entry */,
  "order_id" INTEGER /* Reference to the order associated with the sale */,
  "year" INTEGER /* Year during which the sale occurred */,
  "month" INTEGER /* Month during which the sale occurred (1-12) */,
  "sales_amount" REAL /* Total sales amount for the order */,
  "region" TEXT /* Region where the sale was made */,
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* ID of the customer who made the purchase */,
  "product_id" INTEGER /* ID of the product sold */,
  "quantity_sold" INTEGER /* Quantity of the product sold */,
  "discount_applied" REAL /* Discount applied to the sale */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("sale_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_order_id FOREIGN KEY ("order_id") REFERENCES orders ("order_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_product_id FOREIGN KEY ("product_id") REFERENCES products ("product_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sales_customer_id FOREIGN KEY ("customer_id") REFERENCES customers ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., sales rep, inventory manager, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password for the user */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the user */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Date and time of the last login */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the user was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "customers" (
  "customer_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each customer */,
  "first_name" TEXT /* First name of the customer */,
  "last_name" TEXT /* Last name of the customer */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the customer */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the customer */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the customer */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the customer was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("customer_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Phone number of the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Address of the supplier */,
  "created_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was created */,
  "updated_at" TEXT /* Date and time when the supplier was last updated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)
